transcript.text:
[Chargrilled skewers with 37 years of tradition]
[If you know, you know]
37 years
We prepare the chicken at 6 in the morning for the skewers
[Made with love]
[With special flavors]
[Everyone's favorite]
I came here because I've been told that this place is better than the famous skewer place in Japan
I've never had anything like it
It's not just a regular chicken skewer
Hello everyone
I'm near Seoul station today
I'm here to eat at a very famous chicken skewer restaurant
The most famous in Seoul
I've been wanting to try it
Let's go

Really though
This place looks pretty old I wonder how long they have been in business for
[Spicy chicken stew, chicken skewers, spicy pork & squid bulgogi]
Since they have limited quantity,
It's limited to 2 skewers per customer
And they run out very quickly
I called in advance to get permission to get 10 skewers
We prepare the chicken early in the morning, apply the sauce, and store it in the refrigerator for 4 hours
[Even for the spicy chicken stew]
What?
Why's this so good?
It's one of the best green onion kimchi I've ever had
Thank you
This is a lot of food
It'll taste even better after it's boiled
Looks delicious

Thank you
[Spicy pork bulgogi with squid]
Hey pretty lady, are you doing YouTube?
Thank you
You must be good at eating
I'll try the skewers first because this is what they're known for
It's a chicken party
It's very juicy
Be careful when you're eating this It has bones
I think they use good quality chicken, that's why
It's very tender
I've never had anything like it
Tasty
The sauce is very special
I think this is a wing
Rather than chicken skewers,

it feels like traditional chicken pieces on a stick
Even the chicken breast is chewy
The leg is really tender
Just be careful of the bones
This is the drumette
The skewers are all different
They're all random
The drumette is on top now
Yummy
This is really a first
This has been boiling
I wonder if it'll taste different
Hot
I burned my tongue
The soup is thick
I can taste gochujang (chili paste)

The taste of the perilla leaf is stronger in the soup
[Nod of approval]
Now for the pork bulgogi with squid
There's a lot of squids
Delicious
Their sauce is very special
Bulgogi with perilla leaf
It's good
The smoky flavor from the chargrill
A perfect snack for alcohol
I'm already halfway done
This doesn't have bones
It's totally random
This piece is so tender and nice
A special chicken skewer you can enjoy
The chicken in here is so tender as well

It tastes so good with the green onion kimchi
1 more skewer
Looks like a leg
Leg and thigh?
They must use every piece of the chicken for these
You can tell the drumstick from a drumette apart from the number of bones
This is a leg
[I apologize about the noise in the back, it got really crowded]
It's not too sweet or too spicy The flavors are not too strong
It's like the sauce you use for fried rice
Looks yummy
The soup is the best
The soup is so thick because it's been cooking
Let's eat some bulgogi
It's been scored on top
Something I used to eat at home

Very similar to my mom's cooking
Tasty
When I say that it tastes like something I eat from home,
it means that it doesn't feel like it has artificial flavoring (MSG)
[Potato]
It's fully cooked
The potato tastes amazing
Break it up
Mashed potatoes
I need to mix this with rice
The potato tastes so good
This looks very soft
I think I ate more than 1 chicken from the skewers alone
I will become a chicken at this point
I'm not good at eating chicken
Chicken is one of the foods I can't eat that well

But it keeps going in because the chicken is so tender
Rice cake!
I eat rice cake almost everyday
[Owns a rice cake restaurant] Like.. everyday
[Rice cake accident]
I'm good with chopsticks though
I should've rolled my sleeves up
What a catastrophe
[I'm used to it though]
The food itself is not spicy
Maybe it's the pork bulgogi
The spiciness is stacking up
Get some soup
The squid is endless
Make sure you don't mix this up
Because the bottom is burnt

Just pick out the ones on the top
[Another accident]
What is all of this?
How will I go home like this?
There are skewers left?
It's tasty even if it's been sitting here
Last one
It's cold now, but tasty regardless
This restaurant is known for the chicken skewers
So I've been wanting to come here
This place was so different
Because of the fact that they had bones,
The sauce was very special too
It was a very good meal overall
I really want to get some fried rice in this pot
There were only 2 tables when I came

But now it's a full house
And with people waiting in line outside
I should end the mukbang here so they can be seated
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
